response.justification: The candidate lacks demonstrated C++ experience at the required 8-year level and has no clear track record in cloud compute platforms, distributed systems, or technical leadership in infrastructure roles; their work is predominantly in TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang with minimal evidence of large-scale system ownership or cloud architecture leadership.
strengths: Strong full-stack versatility across languages and domains
Active open-source contributor with tangible public projects
Proven mentorship and workshop leadership in software practices
concerns: No evidence of 8+ years of C++ programming as required
Lacks documented experience in cloud compute platforms or distributed systems leadership
No clear history of technical leadership mentoring cloud/DevOps engineers
